task_completion.description: Log in to the wger application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The wger dashboard is visible in the web browser at http://localhost, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Open the supplier_ingredients.csv file to access the ingredient data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file ~/Documents/supplier_ingredients.csv is open in a text editor, spreadsheet application, or terminal, displaying the list of ingredients and their macronutrients.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the ingredients management section in wger.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The wger web interface shows the Ingredients list or the 'Add Ingredient' form.

task_completion.description: Enter ingredient data from the CSV into the wger application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is seen filling out the 'Add Ingredient' form in wger (or using a bulk import feature) with data matching the ingredients from the CSV (Name, Energy, Protein, Carbs, Fat).

task_completion.description: Verify that the 12 ingredients have been successfully added to the wger database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The wger ingredient list displays the newly added ingredients (e.g., 'Bulk Whey Protein Isolate', 'Organic Rolled Oats') with their corresponding correct macronutrient values.

integrity.description: The agent used the web GUI to add the ingredients.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the wger web interface forms to add ingredients, rather than using terminal commands to inject data directly into the database.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine wger application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows http://localhost and the wger application interface is clearly visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the provided CSV file as the source of truth.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen reading from the supplier_ingredients.csv file rather than hallucinating ingredient data.
